narrative_beat: Rosto de George Orwell em close-up intenso, expressão de choque absoluto e desespero, 45% esquerda do frame, fundo câmeras vigilância P&B desfocadas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, face in rich warm amber and crimson tones, desaturated black-and-white background, 35mm film grain, candlelight, oppressive atmosphere

subject.primary: photorealistic George Orwell, thin British man 1940s, gaunt face, dark sunken eyes, mustache, expression of absolute terror and shock — mouth slightly open, eyes wide — occupying left 45% of frame
subject.focal_point: Orwell's eyes: wide open, terrified, direct camera gaze
subject.secondary: amber candle flame in extreme foreground casting dramatic chiaroscuro shadows on his cheek

environment.location: dark oppressive room, background filled with blurred black-and-white CCTV surveillance cameras mounted on walls, Big Brother propaganda posters out of focus

composition.rule: rule of thirds — face anchored left third
composition.foreground: Orwell face in warm amber/crimson tones occupying left 45% of frame
composition.midground: dark gradient center transitioning to black-and-white
composition.background: blurred surveillance cameras and Big Brother posters in black-and-white, right 35% of frame intentionally dark and empty for text overlay
composition.safe_zone_for_overlay: right third (35%) of frame — intentionally kept dark and clean for title text

lighting.key_light: single amber candle below-left, casting dramatic upward shadows
lighting.fill_light: none — deep shadows on right side of face
lighting.rim_light: faint crimson rim from surveillance monitor glow on far edge
lighting.shadow_quality: deep crushed blacks, Caravaggio-style hard shadows

style.post_processing: halation on highlights, crushed blacks, amber warm tones on face, desaturated cold tones on background, dark crimson vignette edges
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, floating ash embers, dust particles

symbolism.primary: the prophet who saw what would come — and was terrified
symbolism.secondary: surveillance cameras in background = the world Orwell warned about

negative_as_positive: photorealistic, not illustration, not cartoon, not painting
real human face with genuine terror expression — not neutral or calm
face occupies left 45% only — right third must remain dark and empty
background MUST be desaturated black-and-white — face MUST be warm amber/crimson
no text, watermarks, or logos anywhere in the image

in_scene_text.note: Text DANIEL PREVIU / 1984 / 2.500 ANOS ANTES will be added in post-production on right third

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
